name: Grilled Fillets
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow glass casserole dish, combine the balsamic vinegar, lemon juice (at room temperature), olive oil, crushed garlic, ginger, and white pepper.
2. Add the fish fillets to the marinade and turn them to coat evenly.
3. Cover the dish and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, turning occasionally.
4. Spray the grill with cooking spray before preheating it.
5. Drain any remaining marinade and discard it.
6. Grill the fillets for 4 minutes on each side until cooked through.
